waves.title: Source Intake and Canonical Blueprint Merge
waves.goal: Bring the existing Wave37 system, Plans package, docs package, tracker, and reality-status CSVs into one source intake layer.

waves.title: Blueprint-to-System Crosswalk and Gap Resolution
waves.goal: Map blueprint/manual/project-plan items to already completed waves and identify merge gaps.

waves.title: Unified Architecture Responsibility Model
waves.goal: Create the combined architecture tree, owner domains, and source-of-truth relationships.

waves.title: Unified Backlog and Wave Execution Contract
waves.goal: Merge the blueprint plan and current wave system into one backlog, task, and execution contract.

waves.title: Workflow, ComfyUI, and App Mode Integration Bridge
waves.goal: Bind workflow library, ComfyUI runtime, App Mode controls, and blueprint instructions into one operating model.

waves.title: Local, EC2, and Runtime Proof Integration
waves.goal: Combine local execution, EC2 sync, runtime proof, preview gates, and release proof boundaries.

waves.title: Unified QA Certification and Evidence System
waves.goal: Unify QA gates, evidence records, certification packets, state diff, and release decisions.

waves.title: Catalog, Registry, Search, and Traceability Merge
waves.goal: Merge catalogs, registries, search indexes, source traces, and stale-index policy.

waves.title: Combined Migration and Implementation Execution Playbook
waves.goal: Create the step-by-step migration/implementation plan for working on both systems together.

waves.title: Combined Final Handoff and Operating Manual
waves.goal: Assemble the combined operating manual, release checklist, handoff packet, and validation report.
